_comment: Sound behaviour. Edit these numbers only — no code changes needed.
_rotationMinutes: How often the opening sound of each pendant changes. Low for openings, high for general use.
_familiesPerPendant: How many sound families each pendant draws from.
_recFamiliesPerPendant: How many of those must be real field recordings (rec_ prefix).
_subsetRotationDays: Recalculate each pendant's families every N days. 0 = never change.
_minPlaySeconds: Keep a clip playing at least this long before moving to the next.
_crossfadeSeconds: Length of the fade between clips.
